name: Drywall Calculator
seo_description: Calculate how many drywall sheets, kg of joint compound and screws you need. Enter wall dimensions and sheet size to get exact quantities instantly.
description: Free online drywall calculator. Enter wall length and wall height to get instant results.
desc: Free online drywall calculator. Enter wall length and wall height to get instant results.
steps: Joint compound: ~0.5 kg/m² = 8 kg; Tape: ~1.5 m/m² = 24 m
mistakes: Calculating only the net area without adding waste for cuts around outlets
Forgetting ceiling drywall — it uses the same sheet size but needs different screws
Not accounting for double-layer firewall requirements in some rooms
formula_display: Area = Length × Height × layers; Sheets = ceil(area ÷ sheet_size × 1.08)
